inputs.label: Final Length
inputs.businessContext: Length after deformation (e.g., under load or temperature)

businessContext_i18n.en: Length after deformation (e.g., under load or temperature)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deformasyon sonrası uzunluk (örneğin yük veya sıcaklık altında)
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge nach Verformung (z. B. unter Last oder Temperatur)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur après déformation (par exemple, sous charge ou température)

inputs.label: Temperature Change
inputs.businessContext: Change in temperature for thermal expansion calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Change in temperature for thermal expansion calculation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Termal genleşme hesaplaması için sıcaklık değişimi
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperaturänderung für die Berechnung der Wärmeausdehnung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Changement de température pour le calcul de dilatation thermique

inputs.label: Coefficient of Thermal Expansion
inputs.businessContext: Material's linear thermal expansion coefficient (e.g., steel 12e-6)

businessContext_i18n.en: Material's linear thermal expansion coefficient (e.g., steel 12e-6)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin doğrusal termal genleşme katsayısı (örneğin çelik 12e-6)
businessContext_i18n.de: Linearer Wärmeausdehnungskoeffizient des Materials (z. B. Stahl 12e-6)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de dilatation thermique linéaire du matériau (ex. acier 12e-6)

inputs.label: Young's Modulus
inputs.businessContext: Material's modulus of elasticity. Set to 0 to ignore stress

businessContext_i18n.en: Material's modulus of elasticity. Set to 0 to ignore stress
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin elastisite modülü. Gerilmeyi yok saymak için 0 olarak ayarlayın
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Materials. Auf 0 setzen, um Spannung zu ignorieren
businessContext_i18n.fr: Module d'élasticité du matériau. Mettre à 0 pour ignorer la contrainte

formulas.stressMpa: elastic_modulus > 0 ? (((final_length - initial_length) / initial_length) + cte * temperature_change) * elastic_modulus * 1000 : 0

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
